description: Mirror any GTM container into a local database, then audit, diff, and query it from the terminal — everything the GTM console can't do, read-only and safe against production.

env_var_specs.name: GTM_ACCESS_TOKEN
env_var_specs.description: Google OAuth access token (tagmanager.readonly scope). From gcloud auth print-access-token or a service-account token.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-destinations-list
tools.description: Lists all Destinations linked to a GTM Container. Required: parent. Returns array of Destination.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM parent Container's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-environments-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Environments of a GTM Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Environment.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Container's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-list
tools.description: Lists all Containers that belongs to a GTM Account. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Container.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Account's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-lookup
tools.description: Looks up a Container by destination ID. Optional: destinationId. Returns the Container.

params.name: destinationId
params.description: Destination ID linked to a GTM Container, e.g. AW-123456789. Example: accounts/containers:lookup?destination_id={destination_id}.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-snippet
tools.description: Gets the tagging snippet for a Container. Required: path. Returns the GetContainerSnippetResponse.

params.name: path
params.description: Container snippet's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}:snippet

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-version-headers-latest
tools.description: Gets the latest container version header. Required: parent. Returns the ContainerVersionHeader.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Container's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-version-headers-list
tools.description: Lists all Container Versions of a GTM Container. Required: parent. Optional: includeDeleted, pageToken. Returns array of ContainerVersionHeader.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Container's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}

params.name: includeDeleted
params.description: Also retrieve deleted (archived) versions when true.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-versions-live
tools.description: Gets the live (i.e. published) container version. Required: parent. Returns the ContainerVersion.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Container's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-built-in-variables-list
tools.description: Lists all the enabled Built-In Variables of a GTM Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of BuiltInVariable.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-clients-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Clients of a GTM container workspace. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Client.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-folders-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Folders of a Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Folder.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-get-status
tools.description: Finds conflicting and modified entities in the workspace. Required: path. Returns the GetWorkspaceStatusResponse.

params.name: path
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}/workspaces/{workspace_id}

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-gtag-config-list
tools.description: Lists all Google tag configs in a Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of GtagConfig.

params.name: parent
params.description: Workspace's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}/workspaces/{workspace_id}

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-list
tools.description: Lists all Workspaces that belong to a GTM Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Workspace.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM parent Container's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/containers/{container_id}

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-tags-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Tags of a Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Tag.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-templates-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Templates of a GTM container workspace. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of CustomTemplate.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-triggers-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Triggers of a Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Trigger.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-variables-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Variables of a Container. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Variable.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-containers-workspaces-zones-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Zones of a GTM container workspace. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of Zone.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Workspace's API relative path.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-list
tools.description: Lists all GTM Accounts that a user has access to. Optional: includeGoogleTags, pageToken. Returns array of Account.

params.name: includeGoogleTags
params.description: Also retrieve accounts associated with Google Tag when true.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-user-permissions-get
tools.description: Gets a user's Account & Container access. Required: path. Optional: containerVersionId. Returns array of ContainerAccess.

params.name: path
params.description: GTM UserPermission's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}/user_permissions/{user_permission_id}

params.name: containerVersionId
params.description: The GTM ContainerVersion ID. Specify published to retrieve the currently published version.

tools.name: tagmanager_accounts-user-permissions-list
tools.description: List all users that have access to the account along with Account and Container user access granted to each of them. Required: parent. Optional: pageToken. Returns array of UserPermission.

params.name: parent
params.description: GTM Account's API relative path. Example: accounts/{account_id}

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Continuation token for fetching the next page of results.
